problem id: 20abedb7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  11110110 -> 11001001
  01101011 -> 10000100
  11000111 -> 00001111
  01100001 -> 10000000
  11100110 -> 10001001
  01000011 -> 00000100
  00011111 -> 00111100
  00101001 -> 00000000
  01011001 -> 00100000

query: 00001100
predicted answer: 00010000
